sn1.14:1.0.1: v.26"The khattiya is the best of bipeds,The ox, the best of quadrupeds;A maiden is the best of wives,The first born, the best of sons."
sn1.14:1.0.2: v.27"The Buddha is the best of bipeds,A steed, the best of quadrupeds;An obedient woman is the best of wives,A dutiful boy, the best of sons."sn.i.7
